title: Reuse-pattern based co-ordinate multi-point transmission via distributed message exchange
abstract: Methods, systems, and devices for wireless communications are described, including receiving, at a first base station, channel measurement information from a first user equipment (UE); identifying a zone associated with the first base station based at least in part on the received channel measurement information; receiving, from a second base station, zone information associated with one or more UEs that transmitted channel measurement information to the second base station; identifying a network reuse pattern for coordinated multi-point (CoMP) communication based at least in part on the identified zone and the received zone information; and transmitting a multi-point transmission to a second UE based at least in part on the identified network reuse pattern.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A method for wireless communications, comprising: receiving, at a first base station, channel measurement information from a first user equipment (UE); identifying a zone associated with the first base station based at least in part on the received channel measurement information; receiving, from a second base station, zone information associated with one or more UEs that transmitted channel measurement information to the second base station; identifying a network reuse pattern for coordinated multi-point (CoMP) communication based at least in part on the identified zone and the received zone information; and transmitting a multi-point transmission to a second UE based at least in part on the identified network reuse pattern. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising: transmitting zone information based at least in part on the identified zone to a third base station. 3. The method of claim 1, further comprising: transmitting a multi-point transmission to the first UE based at least in part on the identified network reuse pattern. 4. The method of claim 1, further comprising: broadcasting a reference signal to the first UE, wherein the channel measurement information is received in response to the broadcasting. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the channel measurement information comprises: a channel quality indicator, or a precoding matrix indicator, or a combination thereof. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein receiving the channel measurement information comprises: 

 receiving a reference signal from the first UE. 7. The method of claim 1, further comprising: identifying a zone associated with the second base station based at least in part on the received zone information. 8. The method of claim 1, further comprising: comparing a received power of the channel measurement information with a threshold; and identifying the zone associated with the second base station based at least in part on the comparing. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein the identified zone comprises: an exclusive zone, or a serving zone, or a combination thereof. 10. The method of claim 1, wherein the identified zone is based at least in part on a location of the first base station or the first UE. 11. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving the zone information from the second base station is independent of joint precoding information. 12. The method of claim 1, further comprising: transmitting zone information based at least in part on the identified zone to a plurality of base stations within a network via a distributed message. 13. A method for wireless communications, comprising: transmitting zone information to a base station in a coordinated multi-point (CoMP) association; and receiving a multi-point transmission based at least in part on an identified zone related to the CoMP association and the transmitted zone information. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising: identifying a zone related to the CoMP association, wherein the transmitted zone information is based at least in part on the identified zone. 15. The method of claim 13, wherein the zone information comprises: 16. The method of claim 13, wherein the zone information comprises: a response to a reference signal received from the base station. 17. An apparatus for wireless communications, in a system comprising: means for receiving, at a first base station, channel measurement information from a first user equipment (UE); means for identifying a zone associated with the first base station based at least in part on the received channel measurement information; means for receiving, from a second base station, zone information associated with one or more UEs that transmitted channel measurement information to the second base station; means for identifying a network reuse pattern for coordinated multi-point (CoMP) communication based at least in part on the identified zone and the received zone information; and means for transmitting a multi-point transmission to a second UE based at least in part on the identified network reuse pattern. 18. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for transmitting zone information based at least in part on the identified zone to a third base station. 19. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for transmitting a multi-point transmission to the first UE based on the identified network reuse pattern. 20. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for broadcasting a reference signal to the first UE, wherein the channel measurement information is received in response to the broadcasting. 21. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the channel measurement information comprises: a channel quality indicator, or a precoding matrix indicator, or a combination thereof. 22. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for identifying a zone associated with the second base station based at least in part on the received zone information. 23. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for comparing a received power of the channel measurement information with a threshold; and means for identifying the zone associated with the second base station based at least in part on the comparing. 24. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the identified zone comprises: an exclusive zone, or a serving zone, or a combination thereof. 25. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the identified zone is based at least in part on a location of the first base station or the first UE. 26. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising: means for transmitting zone information based at least in part on the identified zone to a plurality of base stations within a network via a distributed message. 27. An apparatus for wireless communications, in a system comprising: means for transmitting zone information to a base station in a coordinated multi-point (CoMP) association; and means for receiving a multi-point transmission based at least in part on an identified zone related to the CoMP association and the transmitted zone information. 28. The apparatus of claim 27, further comprising: means for identifying a zone related to the CoMP association, wherein the transmitted zone information is based at least in part on the identified zone. 29. The apparatus of claim 27, wherein the zone information comprises: a reference signal transmitted on a dedicated channel to the base station. 30. The apparatus of claim 27, wherein the zone information comprises: a response to a reference signal received from the base station.
